name: @gertsai-examples/m9s-example-api-types
description: Hand-aligned OpenAPI 3.1 types mirroring the m9s-example backend handlers (Wave 9 reference application; auto-emission generator removed in Wave 12.E-fix-2 per EVID-053 CRIT-5).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/generated && cp src/generated/openapi-schema.d.ts dist/generated/openapi-schema.d.ts
scripts.test: echo 'no tests yet (snapshot validated via consumer typecheck — m9s-example + m9s-example-web)'
